title: pseudosedum affine
intro: Pseudosedum affine, also known as the White Sedum or False Sedum, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pseudosedum affine has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, thanks to its active compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, Pseudosedum affine is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its dried roots and leaves are also used in traditional remedies.
